overall.description: A cinematic establishing shot from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a futuristic cityscape at dusk. The elevated stationary camera overlooks a dense neon-lit urban center featuring a distinctive circular plaza building, holographic billboards, and flying vehicle traffic passing between skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated cyberpunk city overlook with circular plaza and holographic displays

events.description: holographic billboard cycles to new advertisement display
large flying vehicle passes close to camera from right side temporarily blocking portion of view
holographic billboard transitions to different advertisement content

agents.ego_description: stationary elevated observation of the cyberpunk cityscape, monitoring aerial traffic and holographic displays

notable_agents.action: flying vehicle passing close to camera at high speed

entered.detail: multi-tiered circular structure with prominent red neon accent lighting and steam vents
curved elevated monorail track spanning across the upper portion of the frame
large floating digital display cycling through various advertisements above the plaza
tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows and neon signage
dense cluster of high-rise structures with various colored neon lights

segments.scene_description: A static elevated view of a futuristic cyberpunk city at dusk, centered on a circular plaza building with red neon lighting. The scene features an elevated transit track arching overhead, holographic billboards cycling through advertisements, and flying vehicles navigating between glass skyscrapers. A flying car passes close to the camera around the 28-second mark, temporarily obscuring the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static elevated perspective of a futuristic cyberpunk city at dusk, focusing on the vibrant glow of a central urban hub. It begins with a wide view of a circular plaza building illuminated by red neon lighting, framed by an arching elevated transit track and glass skyscrapers. As holographic billboards cycle through various advertisements, flying vehicles weave through the dense architecture of the city center. The scene then shifts as a flying car glides close to the lens, temporarily obscuring the view before revealing the sprawling, neon-lit cityscape once more.
